caveats: No code written yet — only spec + plan. All architecture decisions are paper-and-signature level; first compile + forward-pass test is still ahead.
Remote third_party/4RC/ clone is currently MISSING (container recycle wiped it). Task A1/A2 restore path.
Stage 1 exit criteria (hand L2 < 10mm, obj L2 < 20mm) are hypotheses — may need to relax after seeing first overfit curve; plan documents this.
4RC ViT-G weights inference API is not yet directly observed; Task A5 documents it; Task B3 (port encoder loop) is the first concrete dependency on that API.
Debug SSH ports rolled today (46681/46682 → 20161/21161); any old ACP startup scripts referencing the old ports need updating.
